blended.narrative: Schweitzer is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,497 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 14" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
